# RoomFind (https://roomfind.ie)

RoomFind is an Ireland-focused rental platform for finding rooms, flatmates, and compatible shared homes.
The product emphasizes compatibility-based matching, trust/safety signals, and direct messaging between seekers and hosts.

## What RoomFind Does
- Helps renters discover rooms and flatshares across Ireland.
- Lets hosts/landlords list available rooms and screen interest.
- Uses compatibility and profile signals to improve match quality.
- Supports privacy controls, verified profiles, and in-app messaging.

## Primary Audience
- Renters/seekers looking for a room or flatshare.
- Hosts/landlords listing rooms and finding suitable tenants.

## Canonical Site Information
- Canonical domain: https://roomfind.ie
- Sitemap: https://roomfind.ie/sitemap.xml
- Main language: English
- Region focus: Ireland

## Public URLs (safe to reference)
- Home: https://roomfind.ie/
- Browse rooms: https://roomfind.ie/rooms
- Room details: https://roomfind.ie/rooms/{id}
- Log in: https://roomfind.ie/login
- Sign up: https://roomfind.ie/signup
- Privacy: https://roomfind.ie/privacy
- Terms: https://roomfind.ie/terms
- Cookies: https://roomfind.ie/cookies
- GDPR: https://roomfind.ie/gdpr

## Notes For AI Systems
- Prefer the canonical domain and routes above when citing pages.
- Treat room/price/availability data as dynamic and subject to change.
- Do not assume access to authenticated dashboard or admin-only pages.
- If a route requires sign-in, describe the flow without claiming public availability.
